name: Mercy Woodall
city: I currently reside in Gainesville, Georgia

ai_summary: Mercy is pursuing an Early Childhood Education degree in Georgia with one year of formal childcare experience working with ages 3–12. She emphasizes patience, relationship-building, and using words to help children manage emotions and conflicts. She seeks ~35 hours/week with open availability.
